headline: ShinyHunters, the elusive hacking network that started in France
description: Despite multiple arrests, numerous data breaches continue to be claimed under the ShinyHunters banner. Beyond its French roots, the group has now become a cybercriminal 'brand.'

headline: At the center of global affairs, Xi keeps Putin waiting on the Power of Siberia 2 pipeline

Trump tightens grip on Republican Party in US primaries
description: Candidates for the Grand Old Party's nomination in November's midterm elections, backed by the president, benefit from the mobilization of the MAGA base, which remains loyal to the billionaire despite his declining popularity.

headline: Musk eyes Wall Street record with SpaceX IPO
description: US media reports say SpaceX is hoping to raise $75 billion and win a valuation of as much as $1.75 trillion when it begins trading as early as next month.

headline: Sweden and France become privileged defense partners
description: Stockholm announced on Tuesday, May 19, that it wanted to acquire four defense and intervention frigates from the French company Naval Group. This order illustrates the growing strategic ties with Paris, facilitated by the Nordic country's accession to NATO.

headline: 'Gaza has become a diplomatic, political and military black hole'
description: Donald Trump's promises for the territory, devastated after two years of war, have continued to be proven wrong in the months following the ceasefire with Israel, writes Gilles Paris, columnist for Le Monde, in his column.

description: The role of prime minister has regained central importance since 2022 and the end of outright majorities in the Assemblée Nationale, observes Le Monde columnist Françoise Fressoz.

headline: Trump sinks lower into nepotism with fund to compensate allies
description: Acting attorney general Todd Blanche announced the creation of a fund totaling $1.776 billion for Trump's prosecuted allies and established a 'permanent' ban on tax audits into the president and his family.

headline: In a tsunami of data leaks, French society remains vulnerable and authorities powerless
description: France is experiencing a record number of data breaches. Despite the damage caused by these hacks, the level of cybersecurity in businesses and government agencies remains inadequate.
